title: Crunchy Arabic Bananas Fritters
description: Pungent and springy banana fritters double-fried to a golden crunch, perfect for a quick Whole30-friendly dessert that is energizing and aromatic.

ingredients.name: Ripe bananas, sliced 1/4" thick
ingredients.notes: Use very ripe bananas for natural sweetness

instructions: Preheat oil in a cazuela over medium heat until it reaches 350°F.
Whisk flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and cardamom in a bowl until combined.
Add water to the dry mix and stir until a thick batter forms.
Dip each banana slice into the batter, letting excess drip off.
Lower coated slices into the hot oil, frying until golden on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove fritters with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Repeat frying for remaining slices, keeping oil at 350°F.
Serve hot, optionally sprinkling extra cinnamon or drizzling unsweetened almond milk.
